into_the_wild.name: Kungsträdgården
into_the_wild.description: A beautiful public garden and park in central Stockholm, especially lovely in the morning hours. Popular spot for locals and visitors to enjoy nature and seasonal attractions.

into_the_wild.name: Skinnarviksberget
into_the_wild.description: A scenic viewpoint hill in Stockholm offering panoramic views of the city. Known for being a chill spot to relax and enjoy the vistas, popular with both locals and tourists.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Skinnarviksberget Viewpoint
gram_worthy_spots.description: An excellent location for photography with stunning views of Stockholm's skyline and cityscape. Perfect for capturing beautiful landscape shots of the city.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Lion Statues Around Stockholm
gram_worthy_spots.description: Iconic small happy lion statues scattered throughout the city that serve as unique photo opportunities and local symbols of Stockholm's character. Available as miniature souvenirs.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Kungsträdgården
gram_worthy_spots.description: A picturesque public garden with seasonal flowers and landscaping that provides excellent photo opportunities, especially during festival season and spring blooms.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Historic Building Restoration Projects
off_the_beaten_path.description: Various facade restoration projects throughout Stockholm where historic 1800s architectural details are being carefully restored. These spots showcase the city's efforts to preserve original decorative elements from before the 1900s.
